messages.content:
What describes the relationship between Agile teams and project requirements?


Agile teams consider submitted requirements but focus more on the team's expertise and perspective to develop the solution.


Agile teams try to capture and define requirements upfront so that future work can be as efficient as possible.


Agile teams embrace changing requirements and modify their development strategy to accommodate the changes.


Agile teams develop intuitively, without requirements or customer feedback.


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: Agile teams embrace changing requirements and modify their development strategy to accommodate the changes.

Which Agile approach helps teams improve their project cycle time by considering team capacity?


XP


Kanban


DevOps


Design Thinking


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: Kanban.

Which statement about Agile is true?


The result of each sprint is a high-quality increment of software or customer value.


The product is developed in a linear fashion.


A sprint back to the beginning is required if changes occur.


Changes are no longer accepted once requirements are defined.


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: The result of each sprint is a high-quality increment of software or customer value.

Why does DevOps recommend “shift-left” testing principles?


It makes collaboration with the client teams easier.


It reduces costly re-work during later delivery stages.


It decreases end-to-end production costs.


It ensures the reduction of overall development time.


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: It reduces costly re-work during later delivery stages.

How do Agile and DevOps interrelate?


DevOps creates software that Agile teams help test and deploy.


Iterations of new increments of software use requirements developed by DevOps.


Iterations of new increments of software use DevOps practices to seamlessly deploy into a customer's hands.


DevOps defines software requirements that Agile teams develop.


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: Iterations of new increments of software use DevOps practices to seamlessly deploy into a customer's hands.

An Accenture Technology team located in the US has added a new feature to an existing online ticketing platform. The team would like to have the new feature reviewed by other global teams using individual instances of the platform.

Which technology, when combined with Agile and DevOps, will help the team receive real-time feedback?


Internet of Things (IoT)


Artificial Intelligence


Cloud


Robotics


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: Cloud. Using cloud technology, the team can easily distribute individual instances of the platform to global teams for real-time feedback.

What is an Agile perspective on errors and mistakes in project development?


Mistakes can be eradicated given sufficient upfront planning and communication.


Mistakes can be caught early by working in short spurts that allow for immediate review, learning, and adjustment.


Mistakes are evidence of risky behavior and indicate more robust governance is required.


Mistakes should be embraced as an opportunity to try new things and see what works.


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: Mistakes can be caught early by working in short spurts that allow for immediate review, learning, and adjustment. Agile promotes iterative and incremental development, which allows for regular feedback and adjustment to catch and correct mistakes early in the project.

An Accenture consulting team is tasked with developing a new client operating model and decide to follow the Waterfall approach. The team misses the client deadline because they did not work together and share information. For the next iteration, the team decides to work in a series of sprints, with brief daily meetings to ensure all team members collaborate effectively.

Which Agile approach is described in this example?


Design Thinking


XP


Scrum


Kanban


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: Scrum. In Scrum, work is divided into sprints, and daily meetings (called Daily Scrum or Stand-up meetings) are held to ensure effective collaboration and communication among team members.

How can a DevOps team take advantage of Artificial Intelligence (AI)?


by ensuring developers have the time needed to write and release code


by allowing AI to organize data into separate silos for better data aggregation


by using AI to collate data from multiple sources and assess existing automation to improve efficiency


by focusing on multiple views into systems, and pushing DevOps issues across the process


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: by using AI to collate data from multiple sources and assess existing automation to improve efficiency. AI can help DevOps teams in analyzing data from various sources, identifying patterns, and automating repetitive tasks for improved efficiency and decision-making.

Which outcome will result from Accenture teams successfully adopting Agile ways of working?


increase in morale and employee engagement among team members


decline in product quality as a result of working in shorter sprints


stricter boundaries between development and testing team responsibilities


increase in time to market as products are not released until they include all features


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: increase in morale and employee engagement among team members. By adopting Agile ways of working, teams typically experience improved collaboration, autonomy, and transparency, leading to increased morale and engagement among team members.

Which statement is true about Agile and DevOps?


Agile and DevOps both focus on reducing challenges and continuously delivering high value to the customer.


Agile and DevOps are ways of implementing technology only in the software development world.


Agile focuses on delivering customer value, while DevOps focuses on testing.


Agile and DevOps are important technologies that bring enormous value to our clients.


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: Agile and DevOps both focus on reducing challenges and continuously delivering high value to the customer. Agile and DevOps are complementary approaches that prioritize collaboration, continuous improvement, and delivering value to the customer. They are not just limited to the software development world and can be applied across various industries. Therefore, the statement that Agile and DevOps focus on reducing challenges and continuously delivering high value to the customer is true.

What are key objectives of DevOps at Accenture?


to gather requirements, design, code, test, and deploy the product prior to customer feedback


to collaborate with customers on the requirements, design, and feedback prior to development


to create a minimally viable product before building the final, polished end product


to deliver services faster, with higher quality, and with built in security


I don't know this yet.

The correct answer is: to deliver services faster, with higher quality, and with built-in security. DevOps at Accenture focuses on accelerating the delivery of services, improving quality, and ensuring security by integrating development and operations teams, implementing automation, and embracing continuous delivery practices.

What type of transaction cannot be stored in blocks on a blockchain?


a transaction that assigns copyright ownership to a song


all types of transactions can be stored in blocks on a blockchain


a transaction that issues token for a carton of milk from Beach Farm in Wisconsin


a transaction that issues a degree to Mary Wilson from Purdue University in Electrical Engineering


I don't know this yet.
All types of transactions can be stored in blocks on a blockchain. Therefore, the correct answer is: all types of transactions can be stored in blocks on a blockchain.
